programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: A boy from Ralph's class goes missing after having a run-in with a deadly criminal; Toby comes closer to discovering the identity of Happy's husband.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: A simple job at the Los Angeles Natural History Museum turns deadly when thieves steal things from a rare gem exhibit to get the materials they need to make a nuclear bomb.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion explores a deep cave system in an effort to prevent a bat population from harming the North American ecosystem; the team dons Halloween costumes for Walter's impending immigration inspection.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: On election day, someone tries to create turmoil in the U.S. presidential election, and Team Scorpion is called to investigate.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: Rick Morgan (Billy Zane), an American engineer who runs a mine in East Africa, is approached one day by his friend Jim Scott (Robert Downey Jr.), who needs someplace to store canisters of toxic waste. Unfortunately, a spill occurs a short time later, resulting in deaths and Morgan having to leave the country. A year later, he is approached by a government agent (Ron Silver) looking for a missing supply of potentially hazardous poison, which in truth hides something even more valuable.

programme.title: Serving Sara
programme.desc: When Sara (Elizabeth Hurley) is served divorce papers while she is in New York, she is stunned. Not about to lose the fortune she amassed with her self-serving Texan husband, she makes an offer to her process server, Joe (Matthew Perry), that sets them off on a wild trip across the country.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers

programme.title: Season Of The Witch
programme.desc: 14th-century knights transport a suspected witch to a monastery, where monks deduce that her powers.

programme.title: Killer Elite
programme.desc: When his mentor is taken captive by a disgraced Arab sheik, a killer-for-hire is forced into action. His mission: kill three members of Britain's elite Special Air Service responsible for his son's deaths.

programme.title: Kandahar
programme.desc: A CIA operative and his translator flee from special forces in Afghanistan after exposing a covert mission.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: A lifelong loser rescues the victims of a plane crash but an impostor gets the glory.

programme.title: Death At A Funeral
programme.desc: Directed by Neil LaBute, Death at a Funeral is a hilarious day in the life of an American family that has come together to put a beloved husband and father to rest. As mourners gather at the family home, shocking revelations, festering resentments, ugly threats, blackmail and a misdirected corpse unleash lethal and riotous mayhem.

programme.title: Roxanne
programme.desc: A big-nosed fire chief (Steve Martin) writes love notes to a gorgeous astronomy student (Daryl Hannah) for a tongue-tied friend, then falls for her himself.

programme.title: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: Faced with unemployment, a former police officer who has been framed, and a former attorney who has been disbarred for incompetence take jobs as guards for a security company.

programme.title: To Sir, With Love
programme.desc: An unemployed engineer takes a job as a teacher of hostile and rebellious students in their last year at a high school in London's tough East End.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds Goes To Town
programme.desc: A reluctant millionaire (Gary Cooper) is declared insane when he announces that he ll give his fortune away to America s poor. Oscar winning direction by Frank Capra.

programme.title: From Here To Eternity
programme.desc: The original Pearl Harbor movie provides a torrid look at military life just prior to the bombing of Pearl Harbor, with remarkable performances from Frank Sinatra, Montgomery Clift, Burt Lancaster, Donna Reed and Deborah Kerr.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny
programme.desc: A naval lieutenant is court-martialed for seizing command of a minesweeper from a neurotic commander (Humphrey Bogart).

programme.title: Bodyguards And Assassins
programme.desc: In 1905, revolutionist Sun Yat-Sen visits Hong Kong to discuss plans with Tongmenghui members to overthrow the Qing dynasty. But when they find out that assassins have been sent to kill him, they assemble a group of protectors to prevent any attacks.

programme.title: Hopscotch
programme.desc: A disgruntled CIA agent quits the service after office politics confine him to a desk job. He heads to Europe, where he links up with a former lover (and fellow ex-agent). All goes smoothly until the CIA agent acts on advice of yet another retired agent, a former Russian rival, who suggests he write a tell-all autobiography. Spitefully, the agent sends out copies of his first chapter to the heads of CIA agencies throughout the world--and from that point on, he and his companion don't have a moment's peace. This delights him now that all of his former colleagues are chasing after him - he has a reason to get up in the morning.

programme.title: 10th And Wolf
programme.desc: A former street tough returns to his Philadelphia home after a stint in the military. Back on his home turf, he once again finds himself tangling with the mob boss who was instrumental in his going off to be a soldier.

programme.title: Down In The Valley
programme.desc: Set in the present-day San Fernando Valley, the project revolves around a delusional man who believes he's a cowboy and the relationship that he starts with a rebellious young woman.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: Alan is a cutter, someone who edits over people's recorded histories. His latest assignment puts him in danger

programme.title: Source Code
programme.desc: An army pilot must travel through time using the 'Source Code' in order to identify a ruthless bomber.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A pilot battles to save his family and the planet after an experiment for unlimited energy goes wrong.

programme.title: Knowing
programme.desc: A professor comes across a series of numbers and realizes they predicted every disaster over the last 50 years

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: Meteor: Day One
programme.desc: A quest begins to find an ancient dial that controls the skies.

programme.title: Space Ranger
programme.desc: The Space Ranger program, set up to protect humans from intergalactic threats in the future, is opened back up when a new threat arrives on Earth, threatening to destroy humanity once and for all.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Alienoid
programme.desc: Gurus in the late Goryeo dynasty try to obtain a fabled, holy sword, and humans in 2022 hunt down an alien prisoner that is locked in a human's body. The two parties cross paths when a time-traveling portal opens up.

programme.title: The Brink
programme.desc: A reckless police inspector is on a mission to crack down on a criminal's gold smuggling scheme.

programme.title: Sword Master
programme.desc: A master swordsman must once again wield his weapon against those who threaten his desire to live in peace.

programme.title: The Emperor's Sword
programme.desc: After hiding a deadly sword that bestows great power upon its wielder, the emperor dies and a deranged rebel seizes power. Now, the young daughter of a great general is all that stands between a tyrant and his quest for domination.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.

programme.title: Anna Nicole
programme.desc: Biopic of Anna Nicole Smith, Playmate and TV personality, culminates in a tragic fatal drug overdose.

programme.title: Cradle of Lies
programme.desc: Marissa was in a coma while pregnant and wakes up five years later to find that the baby she delivered is gone

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Newly married Sandra begins to have serious doubts about her overly possesive doctor husband.

programme.title: Gun
programme.desc: Rich is the police's prime target against the war on gun runners. When an exchange goes bad, paranoia ensues, causing rifts among Rich and his team.

programme.title: Rift
programme.desc: Sr. Special Agent Jason Cole is a man of principles and integrity. With a thriving career, a loving wife, and a reputation for hard work, he seems to have it all. But when his past resurfaces, it forces him into an impossible situation. As time runs out, he must decide: will he do the right thing, even if it costs him everything? The stakes are higher than ever imagined.

programme.title: Mafia
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a fierce crime boss (Ving Rhames) wreaks havoc across the streets, and it's up to hardened detective James Womack (Pam Grier) and her partner Dupree (Robert Patrick) to put an end to organized crime - even if it means breaking the law.

programme.title: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Mike tries to get out of the drug trade to save his little sister, Angel, and leaves her with John (Cuba Gooding Jr.), an undercover cop. Mike is killed, and the drug lords kidnap Angel, forcing John to use all of his skills to save the innocent girl.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: Nico
programme.desc: After a teenage boy is brutally murdered, Detective Carrera defies orders to pursue the truth. As corruption within the police force is exposed, the investigation spirals into a deadly confrontation that will reshape the city and Nico's legacy.

programme.title: Buried
programme.desc: After the murder of his fiancée and her lover, Cameron escapes Atlanta under a new identity and loses the trail of the investigators. When he meets Lauren after settling in Florida, his cover begins to crack when a neighbor begins asking questions, and opening secrets that are supposed to be buried.

programme.title: Commandments of a Female Hustler
programme.desc: Three childhood friends, Lala, Binky, and Jay grew up together on the streets of East Baltimore. Wanting a better life for themselves, they learn the ways of hustling. When they align themselves with one of the most powerful drug dealers in the game, their loyalties are tested, and the very commandments that once bound them start to break.

programme.title: Unintended Consequences
programme.desc: A self-absorbed and ill-equipped father struggles to reconnect with his estranged and embittered son following his discovery of his affair with another woman. Wanting to defend his mother’s honor, his son decides to seek revenge on the mistress.

programme.title: Game of Cards
programme.desc: When data analyst Nicole Tucker’s car is broken into and a mysterious military-issued card tied to her family legacy is stolen, she’s thrust into a dangerous game of betrayal. Her search for the truth uncovers a chilling connection between the theft and her boyfriend Michael, forcing Nicole to confront dark secrets, deadly allies, and a past that refuses to stay buried.

programme.title: Lot Lizards 2: Revenge Route
programme.desc: Destitute and desperate, China is forced to the edge, taking up work as a truck stop sex worker just to survive. Into this grim reality storms Ze, who has come to town seeking vengeance on Angie's sister—the woman who murdered his brother, Tez. But Ze's plans are bigger than just revenge: he aims to rally and recruit every woman working the highway.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's famous detective faces a challenge when enormous monsters attack London.

programme.title: Snowmageddon
programme.desc: A town is in danger of destruction by a mystical snow globe that causes "natural" disasters in the real world.

programme.title: Shark Waters
programme.desc: Sharks attack a fishing charter. Shoreline miles away, those aboard are forced to fight for their lives.

programme.title: Snow White and the 7 Samurai
programme.desc: Left for dead by her stepmother, Snow White is taken in by The Seven Samurai, who train her to fight.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Our Heroes reach their final destination, the "Black Rainbow" drone launch facility.

programme.title: Snow White and the 7 Samurai
programme.desc: Left for dead by her stepmother, Snow White is taken in by The Seven Samurai, who train her to fight.

programme.title: Knightriders (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The members of a traveling Renaissance Faire, who saddle up on motorcycles instead of horses, ride from town to town to stage medieval jousting tournaments with combatants in suits of armor and wielding lances, battle-axes, maces and broadswords. The spectacle of this violent pageant soon garners national attention, much to the dismay of the current king of this Camelot. A challenger to his throne arises as they try to maintain their fairytale existence in a world wrought with corruption.

programme.title: Housebound (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Kylie Bucknell, a troubled young woman, attempts to steal the safe from an ATM but the police capture her. Due to her history of recidivism, she is sentenced to house arrest for eight months under the care of her mother, Miriam. Kylie does not get along with either her mother or her stepfather, Graeme. A security contractor, Amos, explains that Kylie's ankle monitor will alert the police if she ever leaves the premises of her mother's house. Kylie is further frustrated when Miriam claims the house is haunted. Amos takes Miriam's suggestion of a haunting seriously and promises to return with ghost-hunting equipment. After a series of unexplained experiences, Kylie comes to believe there may truly be a ghost in the house. Graeme reveals that their home was once a halfway house and the site of a horrific murder. They discover evidence of the crime, including an orthodontic retainer. Amos attempts to break into her neighbor's house next but the neighbor says that he is not the killer. He tells the story of a young savant, Eugene, whom he adopted. Eugene is an expert at mechanics and electronics and disappeared a year before the killing. Kylie discovers Eugene's secret hallways in their house. She and Amos converge at the police station, and Amos corroborates her wild stories of a serial killer living in the hidden passageways. Once Dennis reveals that he wears a retainer, Kylie becomes suspicious of him. When she confronts him he attempts to kill Miriam and Kylie. Kylie and Miriam flee into the secret tunnels, where they encounter Eugene. Realizing that their paranormal activity has been Eugene all this time, they realize that he is friendly. Dennis stabs Eugene, knocks out Kylie, and begins to strangle Miriam. Eugene wakes Kylie and hands her a weapon, which she uses to stab Dennis. Eugene throws a switch, and high voltage explodes Dennis' head. Months later, all have recovered and Eugene has seemingly become an accepted member of the household.

programme.title: Road Games (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A laid-back American truck driver in south Australia starts to suspect a man driving a green van of killing young women along his route, and proceeds to play a cat-and-mouse game in order to catch him red-handed.

programme.title: Heavy Trip
programme.desc: In this offbeat comedy from Finland, Turo is stuck in a small village where the best thing in his life is being the lead vocalist for the amateur metal band Impaled Rektum. The only problem? He and his bandmates have practiced for over a decade without playing a single gig. The guys get a surprise visitor from Norwaythe promoter for a huge heavy metal music festivaland decide its now or never. They steal a van, a corpse, and even a new drummer in order to make their dreams a reality.

programme.title: Bloody Bites
programme.desc: Streaming exclusively from Bloody Disgusting and Scotchworthy Productions, Bloody Bites is a compilation of snack-sized horror films that will terrorize, astonish, disturb, and excite genre fans across the globe.

programme.title: Party Hard, Die Young
programme.desc: A graduation getaway is grounds for a slasher in this slick teen scream.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: The forces of nature tremble with an unseen evil in this chilling western tale of madness, paranoia and supernatural terror howling across the homestead.

programme.title: Devil's Pass
programme.desc: In this intense thriller, 5 young adventurers retrace the steps of a doomed group of hikers in pursuit of a legendary paranormal mystery.

programme.title: Fried Barry
programme.desc: Fried Barry

programme.title: Martyrs Lane
programme.desc: Young Leah has terrible nightmares and a mother that seems distant somehow - lost in her thoughts. Each night, a mysterious visitor brings Leah comfort, but soon she realizes that this visitor offers knowledge that might be dangerous.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage" - Mrs Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house. However, the Clampett's think he's wanting to marry Pearl, so Jed comes up with a plan to "save" the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed's Dilemma" - Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Rescues Pearl" - Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down. Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "No Place Like Home" - Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man.

programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.desc: A lively old lady arrives in town hot on the trail of a notorious bandit and the reward money for capturing him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A doctor seeks revenge on the man he blames for ruining his practice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas unmasks a killer posing as a door-to-door seed salesman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's sweetheart.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas thinks he has seen a ghost when a man, eerily similar to a man he killed, challenges him to a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas agrees to take a job as an undercover agent and goes to investigate rumors of the sales of arms to renegade Indians. His life is endangered by the town drunk who stumbles onto his true identity.

programme.title: The Desperadoes
programme.desc: A no-holds-barred bar room brawl, a thrilling wild horse stampede, and an exciting gunfight provide the action in DESPERADOES, a big-budget Western.

programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre
programme.desc: A look at what happened to Custer and his troops at the Battle of Little Big Horn.

programme.title: Gunmen From Laredo
programme.desc: A jailed rancher escapes to track down the outlaws who framed him for a murder he didn't commit.

programme.title: Smoky Canyon
programme.desc: The Durango Kid comes to the rescue of some Montana cattle owners and sheepherders after a feud breaks out between the two factions. When a member of Coffin's gang kills a rancher, the dead man's daughter and her fiance get in trouble with the law; that is, until Starrett clears their names.

programme.title: Shut My Big Mouth
programme.desc: Joe E. Brown plays an easterner out West. He unwittingly becomes the sheriff and must fight off blackhearted villain Buckskin Bill (Victor Jory). He does this in drag with marvelous comic effect. Lots of laughs and good direction that never overplays its hand.

programme.title: Cry Blood Apache (Edited Version)
programme.desc: An Apache brave seeks vengeance on a band of sadistic gold hunters in this bloody drive-in western. Pitcalin (Jody McRae) leads the marauders who wipe out an Apache camp when they discover gold, only to watch their violent deeds lead to their own demise. Featuring a superb cast that also includes Dan Kemp, Robert Tessier, and Joel McRae, this coldblooded western tale was directed by character actor and filmmaker Jack Starrett (Cleopatra Jones, The Losers).

programme.title: Hurricane Horseman
programme.desc: Pancho Gomez kidnaps Don Roberto and his daughter, Tonita for ransom. Can an undercover lawman named Gun Smith save the pair, or will he be caught himself?! Smith gets a job in Gomez's camp supposedly to repair their guns. Instead he fixes the guns so they will misfire. When Gomez refuses to let him go, he sends his horse for the Sheriff! This campy western from 1931 stars Lane Chandler and is sure to keep you enthralled from beginning to end. Directed by Armand Schaefer; starring Marie Quillan and Walter Miller.

programme.title: Way of the West
programme.desc: Government agent Gordon (Hal Taliaferro) goes undercover to investigate an ongoing war between cattlemen and sheepmen. But he soon finds himself framed for murder! This low budget western from the short-lived Empire Pictures is from the golden era of shoot em ups, when audiences knew who the bad guys were, and couldnt wait for the good guys to serve up some just punishment!

programme.title: Six Gun Trail
programme.desc: Legendary cowboy star Tim McCoy stars as Captain William Carson, who along with his sidekick Magpie does battle with jewel thieves. Its an actionfilled drama of the West, with plenty of blazing guns and heman adventure! There are a couple of songs, too, including Moon Over the Plains but they arent sung by Tim McCoy. He was too darned tough to sing! Also starring Nora Lane, Ben Corbet; directed by Sam Newfield.

programme.title: Winds of the Wasteland
programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this Republic Pictures western about the final days of the Pony Express. Former rider John Blair (Wayne) enters a coach race to win a $25,000 government mail contract, but there are dozens of obstacles in his path. The rest of the cast includes Lane Chandler and Phyllis Fraser, plus Lew Kelly (Lady of Burlesque) doing a great comic turn as Rocky OBrien, the eccentric, self-proclaimed mayor of a deserted mining town.

programme.title: Sagebrush Trail
programme.desc: John Wayne plays a man wrongly convicted of murder in this exciting western drama from Lone Star Pictures. You'll enjoy plenty of gun action and thundering hoofbeats as he escapes from jail and then joins a gang, hoping to find the real killer! Director Armand Schaefer (The Miracle Rider, The Lost Jungle) whips up some fine performances from a cast of B-movie favorites, including Lane Chandler (Samson and Delilah) and the great stunt rider, Yakima Canutt. And of course, the film features plenty of fight scenes, made memorable by John Wayne's big swinging' right fist! For film buffs: This was one of 11 films Wayne starred in that year, making 1933 one of the busiest years of Wayne's legendary career.

programme.title: Riders of the Whistling Pines
programme.desc: GENE AUTRY COMES ROARING OUT OF THE SKIES...to save the forests from an outlaw lumber ring! When ex forest ranger Gene tries to interfere with a gang destroying the timberland, hes framed for cattle-poisoning and set up for a murder charge. Yet, he still has time to sing some great cowboy songs, including Its My Lazy Day, and Hair of Gold. This is Gene Autry in a slightly different role, with some great footage filmed at Big Bear Valley and San Bernardino National Forest.

programme.title: Gunfight at Dry River
programme.desc: In the Old West, a family of renegades controls the only water source in a Mexican border town ravaged by severe drought. However, when a stranger arrives to reclaim his father's land, a violent confrontation changes all of their lives forever.

programme.title: Richard Hammond welcomes a truly ICONIC car to his workshop!
programme.desc: We’re back with another Cog Score video, where Richard Hammond interviews a special guest whilst their car is put under scrutiny by Mike Fernie and Anthony Greenhouse from Richard Hammond's Workshop. This episode features the one and only AutoAlex (Alex Kersten) and his world-famous Mazda MX-5, Phil! While Alex Kersten is chatting with Richard Hammond upstairs, Mike and Anthony get the Miata MX5 up on the ramp to see how the car is holding up!

programme.title: Was Clarkson Right About The Original Tesla Roadster?
programme.desc: The Tesla Roadster was the original Tesla, the start of Elon Musk's world-beating automotive company. But does it still stack up 15 years on? Was Jeremy Clarkson right in his original controversial review? Mike Fernie goes out in a £150,000 example to find out!

programme.title: This ILLEGAL fluid could increase engine power by 100bhp!
programme.desc: Graphene nanofluids are currently being created by a company called Flexegraph, with the aim being to transform the efficiency of regular car coolant. With this pioneering technology currently being banned by the FIA, how long will it be before these game-changing fluids make it into the automotive world?

programme.title: Transforming Richard Hammond's Subaru from The Grand Tour! | Project Martin Ep.1
programme.desc: Mike originally rescued the Subaru from a secret Grand Tour location, and now is the time to start bringing Richard's STI V-Limited back to its former best. First mission – getting the Martini wrap off!

programme.title: What Makes this ‘Bugatti’ so Cheap?!
programme.desc: The Bugatti Veyron is one of the all-time great cars, but you get one, you're talking at least £1 million. So what if you could buy a car that looks identical to a Veyron, but it was 'only' £150,000? What makes this 'Bugatti' so cheap? Well it's fake! This fake Bugatti has an engine from an Audi RS6, a bespoke steel tube chassis, but a real Veyron windscreen! Is it worth it?!

programme.title: Richard Hammond Has Bought ANOTHER Car!
programme.desc: Oliver the Opel Kadett is arguably the most famous Top Gear car ever and has been a staple of Richard Hammond’s garage for years. In a new twist to his story, Richard Hammond has purchased another car, another Opel, classed as Oliver’s girlfriend. Say hello to Olivia!

programme.title: The DriveTribe Cool Wall
programme.desc: Izzy Hammond is joined by Bella James for another episode of the DriveTribe Cool Wall!

programme.title: End of the Road for Richard Hammond’s Grand Tour GT?
programme.desc: Having rescued Richard Hammond's Aston Martin DB9 from Mauritania, Mike and Maxwell have decided to get it up on a ramp to see just how badly damaged the V12 GT is. The theoretical bill at the end of it is CRAZY.

programme.title: DriveTribe vs AutoAlex Hot Hatch Challenge at the Top Gear Track!
programme.desc: After rescuing a five-cylinder turbo Alfa Romeo Brera from its final trip to the scrapheap, Mike Fernie has challenged the AutoAlex crew to a hot hatch duel at the Top Gear test track. Which sheddy Alfa will prevail ‚Äì five-pot turbo or V6?

programme.title: Clarkson's Girlfriend Reveals Which of Jeremy's Cars She Hates!
programme.desc: Richard Hammond has sent Mike and Maxwell on a mission to deliver some presents to Clarkson's farm. Using the Grand Tour Subaru and DriveTribe Evo, they set off from the Smallest Cog to road trip to Diddly Squat, aiming to find Lisa Hogan for a chat about how Clarkson's Farm is going, and to hand over Richard's kind gifts.

programme.title: We Drove Jeremy Clarkson's Daily!
programme.desc: Mike Fernie has rediscovered a legendary car from Jeremy Clarkson's past ‚Äì the Escort RS Cosworth. Once ran as a daily by the big man himself, Mike takes it for a spin before it goes under hammer, telling the story of how this Cossie dipped in and out of Clarkson's life.

programme.title: Richard Hammond: “This is where it all began”
programme.desc: Richard Hammond has spent the last 25 years establishing himself as one of the biggest names in car media. Starting with Men & Motors, to Top Gear, The Grand Tour and Richard Hammond's Workshop, he has one of the beefiest careers in the business. In this video, he goes back to the genesis of it all, tracing a childhood story that laid the foundations for his amazing adventures on-screen.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Drives His Daughter’s £1,500 Project Car!
programme.desc: Izzy Hammond has worked hard to finish her first project car – a supercharged Mini Cooper S. To make sure she's done a good job and it's all bolted safely together, she's enlisted the help of a test driver to give it a shakedown on track... Her dad!

programme.title: Why BMW Hates V6 Engines
programme.desc: BMW has never made one of the most obvious engine layouts, the versatile V6. Mike dives into the engineering of a V6 versus a straight-six, and why BMW has always opted for the latter.

programme.title: Ben Collins Finally Sets a Lap Record!
programme.desc: Mike and Ben head to the northernmost race circuit in the UK ��� Knockhill ��� to set the EV lap record. Using MG's latest performance cars through the Cyberster and 4 X-Power, the lads head out on track to make history!

programme.title: Richard Hammond ROASTS James May's Pub
programme.desc: For the first time since he bought the Royal Oak, James May has invited Richard Hammond for a tour of his pub.

programme.title: Izzy Hammond Has Bought A Cheap Range Rover!
programme.desc: The Smallest Cog has gone nuts and bought three incredibly cheap Range Rovers ��� Isaac���s ��170 crash-damaged P38, Lewis��� scraggy ��600 P38, and Izzy has decided to join in with an ��800 L322. Mike is shown around the three cars, discovering their best and especially worst bits, deciding who has got the best value for money.

programme.title: Exploring the island that Jeremy Clarkson once called home!
programme.desc: The Isle of Man is steeped in Top Gear history, especially considering Jeremy Clarkson used to own a place on the island. But did you know it also has a lot to offer on top of just the unrestricted TT roads? Mike Fernie takes the DriveTribe M5 Touring for a spin around the island to explore this petrolhead paradise.

programme.title: James May visits Richard Hammond's workshop to get help!
programme.desc: Back in January, James May sought out The Smallest Cog to help with a special project of his – the restoration of a road bicycle. Mike follows the happenings of the day, including Richard, James, Neil and lots of filing of bike frames. If only James still had a classic car to restore...

programme.title: Richard Hammond needs your help – NEW TV SHOW IDEA!
programme.desc: Welcome to something a bit different on DriveTribe – a new TV show pilot! We have worked really hard on this one to make it arguably the biggest project we've ever filmed for the channel! Richard Hammond hates these two cars, so let him explain how he plans to 'cull the herd' and move the car industry in the right direction.

programme.title: Richard Hammond has bought back the car he regrets selling!
programme.desc: Richard Hammond owned numerous cars throughout the Top Gear era, and today we reunite him with one of his favourite cars from the good old days. We say reunite... He's only gone and bought it back!

programme.title: V10 BMW M5 Touring Manual - Have We Built The Ultimate BMW?
programme.desc: After manual-swapping our BMW M5 Touring, there was only really one place we could take it for a first drive – the unrestricted Isle of Man! Mike gives the V10 estate the full send around the island, all while speculating on the future of analogue performance cars and whether such beasts will exist in the near future.

programme.title: Why are V10 engines completely gone from modern cars?
programme.desc: The V10 engine is all but gone from the car industry, but with the V8 and V12 still going strong, why has the V10 died? Mike Fernie takes the DriveTribe M5 Touring for a spin to investigate this mystery.

programme.title: Some idiot crashed into Richard Hammond's pick-up truck
programme.desc: Someone crashed into Richard Hammond’s pick-up truck! Richard loves his Ford Ranger, his workhorse that he uses to commute to-and-from the Smallest Cog. But a few weeks ago, it was crashed into, ironically by one of Richard’s other cars from an upcoming Grand Tour special. Mike has decided to be a good samaritan and – while Richard was away on holiday – he set about fixing the boss’ truck.

programme.title: I've Been Killing Slimes For 300 Years And Maxed Out My Level
programme.desc: Aizawa Azusa, a corporate drone who died of exhaustion from overwork in her previous life, is reincarnated in another world, where she decides to live out a slow and uneventful life forever. But then, 300 years later, she discovers that the experience she earned by defeating slimes every day just to keep up her easy lifestyle has brought her to level 99 and made her the strongest in the world. The rumors begin to spread, and soon trouble comes knocking...

programme.title: I've Been Killing Slimes For 300 Years And Maxed Out My Level
programme.desc: After becoming the strongest in the world before she even knew it, Azusa entered into a new lifestyle with her first pupil, Laika the dragon, and discovered fun and enjoyment in it that she hadn't known before. But then, one day, a young girl calling Azusa her "mama" shows up and proclaims that her younger sister wants to kill Azusa. But Azusa has no memory of giving birth to these two girls, or of becoming a mother at all...

programme.title: I've Been Killing Slimes For 300 Years And Maxed Out My Level
programme.desc: Just as peace is beginning to reign in Azusa's home, a young elf named Halkara shows up pleading for her help. Halkara says that an energy drink she made angered a terrifying high demon, Beelzebub, who is now out to kill her. Azusa would prefer to avoid anything that might ruin her slow life, but she can't just leave the poor girl to die, so she reluctantly agrees to shelter her...

programme.title: I've Been Killing Slimes For 300 Years And Maxed Out My Level

The mountain is bustling with the many Red Dragons who have gathered for the ceremony. Azusa congratulates Leila and the ceremony carries on in peace... until the Blue Dragons, a tribe with a long-standing grudge against the Red Dragons, attack in full force!

programme.title: I've Been Killing Slimes For 300 Years And Maxed Out My Level
programme.desc: Halkara has built a new Nutri-Spirit factory in a nearby town and is now regularly going there from the cottage in the highlands, but she comes home exhausted every evening. It seems rumors have spread saying there's a ghost showing up at the factory, so she's had to do all the work alone since all the locals are scared to go there. Azusa doesn't deal well with ghosts at all, but she can't bear to let Halkara work herself to exhaustion, so she summons Beelzebub to help and heads to the factory late at night.

programme.title: Stomping Grounds
programme.desc: Host Ryan McVinney takes Boat Trader fans on an indepth exploration of Florida flats fishing deep in the backcountry of Islamorada. Featuring Captain Eric Lund, a Wall Street Broker turned backcountry fishing guide, this episode reveals the key design features of the world’s best flats skiffs and how they are built for targeting some of the most exciting sportfish species on the planet. Also, covered are bay boats and their versatility for families exploring Florida’s coastal waterways, along with a detailed study of fish species and wildlife in the region. Some of the area’s most beautiful and secret locales show why Islamorada has earned the nickname of the Sportfish Capital of The World.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques and Julia create some very special desserts in this colorful episode. Poires Belle Helene - poached pear perched atop pound cake drizzled with chocolate sauce; sweet creamy rich and delicious Strawberries Sabayon; and Crepes Suzette, classically flambéed and served with orange butter and powdered sugar, as well as a Hungarian inspired torta of layered crepes baked with raspberry jam.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Salads
programme.desc: Jacques dressed in a toga? For the Julia's Caesar Salad, of course! This show has a salad for everyone, from a simple mixed green salad with a garlic vinaigrette, to classic Caesar and Nicoise (with fresh seared tuna) Salads. How about some Potato Salad? Well, Julia and Jacques prepare two: an American style potato salad with home made mayonnaise, and its tart French cousin.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Vegetables
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques prepare artichokes—several ways—including artichoke hearts stuffed with spinach and mushroom Duxelle. Julia demonstrates her secret to ever-green cooked string beans and butter bruised peas. Jacques counters with his aromatic Tomato Provencal.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Beef Stew
programme.desc: Sounds rather ordinary for this celebrated duet…but here, Jacques and Julia demonstrate why Beef Burgundy and Pot Roast have beens favorite “classic” recipes (here and in France) for what seems like “forever,” and they put their own signature on it “Swiss cheese mashed potatoes” (for the Beef Burgundy), and “soft ribbon noodles” (fort the Pot Roast).

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Fish
programme.desc: Sole food and more. One of Julia’s most memorable meals was the Sole Meuniere she had on first arriving in Paris after WWII. With Jacques, she recreates this dish, as delightful as ever. The sole is followed by grilled halibut with herbed butter, and poached snapper with beautifully turned and sautéed cucumbers.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Pork
programme.desc: A classic of the American table--pork chops and applesauce, is the starting point for three J&J improvisations: aromatic grilled, stuffed pork chops with rosemary, served with a tomato, red onion and avocado salad; loin of pork with sautéed red cabbage and apples, and Pork Tenderloin Medallions with port wine and macerated prunes on a bed of orzo.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Creamy Desserts
programme.desc: Julia dons safety goggles and takes up a blowtorch for this hot dessert show. Delectable Creme Caramel and creme Brulé vie for attention with creamy Chocolate Pot de Creme and Profiteroles with Ice Cream and Mocha Anglaise. This show is deliciously and elegantly decadent.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Shellfish
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques share opinions, and know-how, on mussels…and, oysters, clams and shrimp. Jacques shucks, Julia sauces, and they turn out Mussels Mariniere, Billi Bi soup, and Moules Ravigots, along with a classic shrimp cocktail and mignonette sauce.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Roast Chicken
programme.desc: Perfectly roasted chicken says Julia, is a telltale of a really good cook. Here are three ways to perfectly roasted chicken. Whether whole rack-roasted or trussed and stuffed under the skin with a savory and shallot sauté, or butterflied and roasted with a delicate spice rub, each has a crispy golden brown skin and juicy meat that say “Hmmmm! Great chicken!”

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques demonstrate the art, and the adventure, of the Soufflé. Julia extends the classic cheese soufflé to super-height…and Jacques creates a light, fluffy, flavorful scallop and cheese soufflé in a large casserole. For dessert, a chocolate soufflé and cream roulade. Twinkies were never this good!

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Winter Vegetables
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques take the doldrums about of Winter Vegetables, and demonstrate how even vegetables cooked only in season can be a special treat. Braised Cabbage stuffed with a flavorful ground beef and rice filling, one way with onions, celery, garlic and caraway seeds, and another surrounded with tomato sauce.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Charcuterie
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques demonstrate recipes for sausage and paté that are right out of the French countryside. Made from scratch sausage and lentil salad, country paté (2 ways), and, for a finale, a grand truffle infused sausage wrapped in fresh baked brioche (recipe also demonstrated).

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Roast of Veal and Leg of Lamb
programme.desc: First is a Roast of Veal with Wild Mushrooms, Braised Endive, onions and white wine—the aromas just fill the kitchen. Second is a delicious Leg of Lamb, hip bone removed, studded with garlic on a ragout of white beans and pancetta, onions, mushrooms and thyme. And, not only are you shown how to prepare these dishes, but Jacques then demonstrates, step-by-step, how to carve and serve them.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom learn the secrets behind the perfect traditional English roast dinner in London’s historic Borough Market, explore the best of the diverse food offerings in Brick Lane and pop in to see their friend, Sir Ian McKellen, in his pub in East London.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This kitchen was over thirty years old and had started to show its age. Without making any structural changes, we’re updating an outdated galley-style kitchen to be more modern and efficient while reusing the existing appliances to stay in budget.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: These homeowners are adding a large pressure treated wood deck, complete with a covered outdoor cooking area and storage underneath, so they can further enjoy outdoor living. We’re also adding handrails, steps, and built-in seating.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Whether you have an inefficient clothes dryer or are tired of waiting for hot water, we’ve got the answer. Watch this episode to find the solution to common home problems, including DIY recycling chutes and dumbwaiters.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Technology has had an enormous effect on the way we live, and this is especially true around the home. In this episode we take a look at several systems designed to automate the home and make it more comfortable, more attractive, and more efficient.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Join Danny as he oversees the transformation of a cramped bathroom that has changed little in decades into a master bath and closet/dressing area that perfectly balances indulgence and practicality.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In the conclusion of this special series, the cramped outdated bathroom is transformed into a modern masterpiece while Danny continues to share his insights on the decision making homeowners’ face when remodeling a bath.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Whether you call it building green or eco-friendly construction or sustainable development, the trend has really taken hold. We talk to professionals about what it means to build green, and see it first hand in homes and even entire communities.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In this episode you’ll find out when it’s time for a new roof, what type of roofing to choose, and how to hire a roofer. We’ll visit a roofing design center to find out what’s available in the world of roofing and how to purchase a new roof.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Regardless of your budget we’ve got projects inside and out, from large scale remodel to simple upgrades, that’ll help you improve your home including an open house remodel, an exterior porch addition, curb appeal, and interior enhancements.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In this episode we remodeled an 80-year-old kitchen in a home, which required inspecting and reinforcing the existing foundation to make sure that it would support the additional weight of new cabinets, appliances and stone countertops.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In this episode we update a living room with new surfaces to give it a modern, more formal touch. A new fireplace gives the room a warm, comfortable feel while replacing the old white carpet with new wood floors adds a bit of formality.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Danny serves as a behind the scenes tour guide for the 2007 International Builders’ Show in Orlando, Florida, where new products, trends, and ideas to improve your home were on display, with a sneak peek at innovative home products.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: The family that bought this two-story home fell in love with its architectural style but new it needed a considerable amount of work. We added over 2000 square feet with a two-story addition plus an additional 500 square feet with a new back porch.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In this episode, Danny demonstrates how to handle some of the most typical problems found inside the home from repairing an interior door by putting pressure on the hinge pin to eliminating water stains on ceilings.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This kitchen was dated and too small for the homeowners. Needless to say, it was ready for a change. Instead of widening the kitchen to increase square footage the new plan added about eight feet to the length of the kitchen.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: It’s an ordinary town with a history of heartache. No one knows why Moore, Oklahoma has been the target of 3 mega-tornadoes in just 16 years. On the heels of the May 20, 2013 EF5 tornado, Mark & Jaclyn uncover stories behind the disaster, the recovery and the tenacious spirit of the people of the US Midwest.

programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.title: Angry Planet

programme.title: Angry Planet

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the world’s worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet – 231 miles per hour – was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a “human popsicle”, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Council’s high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Dominica, the most volcanic and mountainous island in the Caribbean, is home to the Boiling Lake, a large waterfall-fed lake of furiously boiling water. Adventurer George Kourounis becomes the first person ever to traverse across the lake on a rope, risking his life to take water samples and shoot video from a place no human has ever been. He then dives to the ocean floor off the coast of the island to explore vents where the superheated water bubbles into the ocean.
